metadata.title: Mik Server - Creative Casual Server
metadata.description: A creative casual Minecraft server that allows any mods, focused on building creation

hero.badge: Creative Mode • Mods Allowed • Application Required
hero.title: Welcome to Mik Server
hero.description: A free, non-profit creative server where anything goes — mods, hacks, you name it — as long as you don't grief others' builds. Unleash your creativity with powerful tools like Axiom and WorldEdit, and explore the endless possibilities of building alongside like-minded players.
hero.notice: This server requires application and is only open to approved players

playerHistory.title: Player History
playerHistory.empty: No player history is available for this time range.

chart.keyboardHint: Arrow keys to step · End latest · Home peak · Esc unlock

selectedPoint.title: Selected Point
selectedPoint.noPlayers: No players were online at this point.

playerHistory.staleWarning: The latest refresh failed. Showing the most recent successful snapshot.

vanilla.title: Creative Casual Experience
vanilla.description: The server allows any mods (including hacks) and supports powerful building tools like Axiom and WorldEdit. We are committed to providing maximum freedom for building creators, letting your creativity run wild without restrictions.

community.title: Curated Player Community
community.description: Through our application system, we carefully select every player who joins the server to ensure a friendly and harmonious community atmosphere. Here, you will meet a group of quality players who love building creation and respect others' works.

buildings.title: Building Gallery
buildings.description: Showcasing amazing building works by our players

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested may have been moved, removed, or the link is incorrect.

wiki.title: Game Guide
wiki.description: Learn about server rules, commands, and gameplay tips

wiki.searchEmptyDescription: Try a shorter keyword, a command alias, or a different phrasing.
